item.title: F-005: Document Doctor
item.intent: The editor must proactively catch structural issues in markdown files — broken links, heading hierarchy, formatting problems — without interrupting the writing flow
item.description: Background analysis with inline indicators. MVP rules: broken relative links, heading hierarchy skips, duplicate headings, trailing whitespace, missing blank lines between blocks. Subtle underline/margin indicators (shape+color, not color alone). Tap for popover with Fix/Dismiss. Per-file per-session dismissals. Non-blocking. Haptic on fix. Evaluates within 1s of open, re-evaluates within 500ms after edits pause.

steps.title: Create EMDoctor module with DoctorRule protocol and DoctorEngine
Implement 5 MVP rules: HeadingHierarchy, DuplicateHeading, BrokenRelativeLink, TrailingWhitespace, MissingBlankLine
Add EMDoctor to Package.swift with correct dependencies
Integrate doctor into EMEditor via DoctorCoordinator
Wire doctor into EditorShellView with Fix/Dismiss actions
Write comprehensive tests for all rules

acceptanceCriteria: Doctor indicators appear within 1 second of opening a file with structural issues
User taps indicator, sees suggestion, can accept fix or dismiss
Dismissals persist for the session but not across file closes
Doctor never prevents writing or saving
VoiceOver announces each issue when navigating to indicators
Doctor does not flag valid but unusual markdown as an issue (low false positive rate)
Doctor runs in both rich text and source view
Doctor evaluates a 3000-line document within 2 seconds
